smg.text: Cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 6 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
